_doc: High-level map of the live discovery seed/planning pipeline.
historical_numbering_note: The numbered files in this folder are documentation buckets, not the exact runtime order.

runtime_order.name: NeedSet
does: emit needset_computed preview before the Schema 4 LLM call
emit needset_computed again with Schema 4 panel data when available
emit schema4_handoff_ready when search_plan_handoff has queries

runtime_order.name: Brand Resolver
does: optional manufacturer auto-promotion into categoryConfig source maps
emit brand_resolved through the caller logger
conditional: skips to empty result when brand is empty
skips to empty result when no triage route is available
returns empty result on resolver failure

runtime_order.name: Search Profile
does: load learning artifacts and merge learningStoreHints into the lexicon
optionally build Effective Host Plan and host-plan query rows
runtime_order.note: This stage is in-memory only. The planned search_profile artifact is written by Query Journey.

runtime_order.name: Search Planner
does: derive archetype/frontier context from Search Profile output
emit search_plan_generated when the stage has query output

runtime_order.name: Query Journey
does: merge deterministic base templates, deterministic targeted rows, guarded Schema 4 rows, and Search Planner uber queries
dedupe and rank the merged rows
apply identity guard to the ranked set
guard host-plan rows separately and append unique survivors

runtime_order.name: Search execution
does: emit search_queued before execution so the GUI pre-populates worker slots
plan-only fallback only when no provider path exists and rawResults is still empty

runtime_order.name: SERP triage
does: LLM selector path when serpSelectorEnabled and a triage route are both available
fallback deterministic soft-label, lane, scoring, and quota selection path
optional rerankSerpResults() annotation on the deterministic path
write executed search_profile and discovery payloads

runtime_order.name: Planner queue handoff
does: seed candidate URLs only when fetchCandidateSources is enabled and maxCandidateUrls > 0
emit discovery_enqueue_summary from planner counters when available

artifacts.seed_phase_carrythrough: runDiscoverySeedPlan() attaches seed_search_plan_output to the discovery result

llm_surfaces.conditional: only when config.serpSelectorEnabled is true and hasLlmRouteApiKey(config, { role: 'triage' }) is true
only on the deterministic triage path when deterministic quality is weak

runtime_bridge.search_profile_event_note: search_profile_generated is emitted from Query Journey after Search Planner, but the bridge maps it to the Search Profile tab

learning_loop.current_wiring_note: buildSearchPlan() supports learning dead-domain/dead-query suppression, but runNeedSet() currently passes learning: null into buildSearchPlanningContext().
